case_title: JOHNSON, JAMES E. VS GEMAYEL, JORGE DBA G&K AUTOMOTIVE CONVERSION

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED; NOTICE MAILED TO PARTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, JAMES E. AS TO DEFENDANT GEMAYEL, JORGE DBA G&K AUTOMOTIVE CONVERSION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GEMAYEL, JORGE DBA G&K AUTOMOTIVE CONVERSION DISMISS W/O PREJUDICE, IMPROPER VENUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
